Video.summary: A family with kids is taken on a high speed car chase. A intoxicated suspect tries to jump a fence while protesting that heĺs not trying to run away. A jealous boyfriend terrorizes his girlfriend and her parents.
Video.title: High Jump Fail

Video.summary: A sting operation is set up to catch narcotics dealers. A man flees a restaurant without paying his four-hundred-dollar tab. A traffic stop for a tint violation leads to a felony arrest for narcotics.
Video.title: Dine and Flee

Video.summary: A suspect runs from an illegal gambling game claiming shots were fired. A man is caught trespassing on school grounds. A male driver wearing a halter top is pulled over for a minor traffic violation.
Video.title: The House Always Wins

Video.summary: A man rams his wifeĺs car into his daughterĺs car. Deputies find a rifle in a suspectĺs car that was in a prior altercation. A man claims to run a travel business after deputies find evidence of id theft.
Video.title: Bumper Cars

Video.summary: A man on parole dumps a stolen car and flees from officers on foot. A man denies stealing a wallet from a car with a smashed window. A hostile woman gives officers a false name.
Video.title: Memory Loss

Video.summary: Officers get a tip and locate the suspect in a recent shooting. A woman is questioned when she is found parked alone in her car behind closed businesses. Officers respond to a call involving juveniles spray painting an electrical box.
Video.title: You're Not Banksy

Video.summary: A suspect in a traffic stop decides to handle the situation by screaming at the police. Officers have a close encounter with a suspect who admits that he has hidden contraband. A manĺs clothing choices tip police off to possible criminal behavior.
Video.title: Poor Conflict Resolution

Video.summary: Officers are called when two intoxicated suspects decide to have some fun and vandalize a fence. Undercover officers set up a narcotics sting at a hotel. A man is found lying naked in a parking lot.
Video.title: Naked and Tired

Video.summary: Police officers set up a sting operation using a taxi cab in to bust prostitution. A man claims he canĺt remember his Ĺgirlfriendĺsĺ name when officers suspect the woman is actually a stranger. Female undercover officers set up a sting operation to bust johns.
Video.title: Amnesia Can Happen

Video.summary: A woman stuffs drugs into her under garments. A mother attacks her daughter because she got married in Vegas. Officers are called when a woman is accused of stalking her friend.
Video.title: Victoria's New Secret

Video.summary: Deputies chase a man who flees a routine traffic stop. Deputies find drugs on a man who gives them an expired license. Officers respond to a man attacking several patrons in a bar.
Video.title: Last Call Brawl

Video.summary: A man wanted for unpaid child support hides from deputies. Officers respond to a sexual predator following a minor. A man with a checkered driving record crashes his car.
Video.title: He's the Gingerbread Man

Video.summary: An Officer attempts to pull over a car which leads to a high speed pursuit. An Officer encounters an apartment fire. A man is hit by a vehicle in a trailer park.
Video.title: Shots Fired

Video.summary: The suspect of a carjacking tells an Officer that he would rather go to jail than face the wrath of his mother. An Officer investigates a domestic call involving a husband, wife and a lamp. A slow speed pursuit ensues and the suspects are booked for felony, eluding, and drugs.
Video.title: Momma's Boy

Video.summary: Officers respond to a traffic dispute involving an assault with a tire iron. Police are led to a battered woman after she dials 911. Officers on patrol encounter a couple engaged in prostitution.
Video.title: Tire Iron Road Rage

Video.summary: A man involved in a drug deal claims he works for the task force. An irate woman slams the front door when Officers arrive. Police pull over two young suspects in an area known for drug activity.
Video.title: Iĺm With You Guys

Video.summary: Officers are assaulted by the brother of a suspect who is resisting arrest. A resident sprays water on his neighborĺs noisy dogs. Officers recover drugs and cash after pulling over a motorist.
Video.title: Who Wet the Dogs Out

Video.summary: An officer poses as a prostitute in an attempt to attract ôjohnsö. A suspect flees on foot through the woods following an assault. An officer investigates a local bar known for illegal activity.
Video.title: Trouble Brewing

Video.summary: An officer coordinates a reverse prostitution sting to capture suspects who solicit prostitutes. An inebriated man is detained until he sobers up. Officers stop a stolen vehicle.
Video.title: Misrepresented

Video.summary: A decoy vehicle is strategically abandoned in a public parking lot. An officer responds to a burglary in progress at a tire store. Officers respond to a domestic call at a nearby trailer park.
Video.title: Follow the Tire Tracks

Video.summary: Officers investigate two vehicles involved in an accident. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a knife. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a gun at a convenience store.
Video.title: Lightening Shock

Video.summary: A vehicle is caught traveling in the opposite direction. A sting operation is designed to nab suspects who purchase narcotics. Officers respond to a shoplifting call at a local thrift store.
Video.title: Thrifting and Shoplifting

Video.summary: Officers investigate an apparent stabbing. Officers respond to a call about a suspicious man loitering in a private park. A driver insists his vehicle is not stolen even though the plates are.
Video.title: Loiter with intent

Video.summary: Police work a sting that targets drug dealers. An undercover sting discovers narcotics trafficking. Police respond to a burglary in progress and discover a flop house.
Video.title: Undercover Blues

Video.summary: A man tries to bite an officer after narcotics are spotted in his mouth. Officers respond to a family fighting in their front yard. A suspect claims to be repaying a debt when he's caught buying drugs.
Video.title: I Always Pay My Debts

Video.summary: A man who ran from police complains that he was not read his rights. Officers detain kids who threw rocks at windowfronts. A paranoid man claims he is being chased by drug dealers.
Video.title: Skipping Rocks

Video.summary: A suspect foolishly tries to elude police in a bright yellow sports car. Roommates arenĺt always there for each other when police are called to break up a fight. No one in a stopped vehicle wants to admit to ownership of contraband.
Video.title: I Won't Be There for You

Image.alt: I Won't Be There for You
I Won't Be There for You
I Won't Be There for You
I Won't Be There for You
I Won't Be There for You
I Won't Be There for You
I Won't Be There for You
I Won't Be There for You
I Won't Be There for You

Video.summary: A woman needs police help when her boyfriend threatens her with a knife. A zebra runs loose on the streets of Sacramento County. A man wants to use a stick and a rock to settle a dispute.
Video.title: If You Hear Hooves

Video.summary: A foot chase gets complicated when the suspect proves heĺs not in good health. A suspect believes he doesnĺt need to follow the rules of the road. A man calls the police on his ex-girlfriend when she makes a moving mistake.
Video.title: Above the Law

Video.summary: A car thief leads police on a high-speed chase until officers pit his vehicle to end the pursuit. Cops cool off a baby and search for the man who left him in a car. Potty-mouthed witnesses inform officers that their friend has been stabbed in the chest.
Video.title: This Man Stabbed Me

Video.summary: A suspect flees as officers respond to a fight call. A belligerent meth user refuses to cooperate after being pulled over. A cranky husband gets busted for pot after his wife kicks over his Harley.
Video.title: Fight and Flight

Video.summary: A suspect races through the neighborhood after his scooter canĺt outrun police. Cops discover a drugged, incoherent wild man lying in the bushes. Officers try to make peace between neighbors with pit bull problems.
Video.title: Blood and Scars, Bro!

Video.summary: A belligerent gun-toting man doesn't take too well to some harsh parental criticism. A bike rider tries to outpace a policeman then pretends to be someone else. Officers try to coax a rattled hit-and-run driver into coming clean.
Video.title: Kill ĹEm With Kindness

Video.summary: The K-9 unit responds when a gunman takes to the rooftops. A drug exchange goes awry when the dealer tries to ditch his stash. A pickup-driving drunk tries to play it off when he smashes his neighbor's parked car.
Video.title: Get Off My Roof

Video.summary: A transgender woman in a wheelchair opens a can of whoop ass on an aggressive bully. Officers find a barely dressed couple in the midst of a biting match. A reckless driver doesnĺt take too kindly to being pulled over.
Video.title: Love Bites

Video.summary: Three men try to convince cops they had no idea their vehicle was stolen. Officers respond after a partygoer mistakes another guestĺs finger for dessert. A domestic abuse suspect makes police run through the streets.
Video.title: Lady Bit My Finger

Video.summary: Hitching a ride home with the wrong guy almost lands one woman in the slammer. A known prostitute wonĺt be going on a second date. When a domestic partner refuses to leave home, officers intervene.
Video.title: Drunk in Love

Video.summary: A dangerous high speed motorcycle chase ends in a wreck and a subsequent arrest. A Florida woman is pulled over in a routine traffic stop and is rewarded for her cooperation. A sheriff creates harmony between a quarreling couple at a mobile park.
Video.title: Abandonment of a Trailer

Video.summary: Witnesses of a car burglary assist an officer in locating the suspect. An officer investigates a fight involving a young man and a homeless gentleman. A suspectĺs testimony is debunked after an eyewitness confirms that his knife wounds were self-inflicted.
Video.title: Unlucky Strikes

Video.summary: Officers arrest a female driver for drug possession and whose mother scolds her before sheĺs carted off to jail. An officer arrests a man who alleges that heĺs waiting for his date for outstanding warrants and a stolen vehicle. An officer takes a known prostitute to jail.
Video.title: Wake Up Jamie

Video.summary: Officers respond to an assault call which escalates to car chase and the eventual arrest of two suspects. Officers spot a known drug dealer who uses a troubling method to conceal his narcotics. An officer curbs a heckler outside a popular bar.
Video.title: Traffic Stop Interrupted

Video.summary: Teens are arrested after authorities find an open container and drugs inside a vehicle. A suspect is arrested after fleeing the police. Officers respond to a fight involving two men and a shovel.
Video.title: Pumping Iron

Video.summary: An arrest is made in a buy-bust sting operation. An elderly man is questioned after reportedly kicking a juvenile in the face. A man is shot in the head by his roommate.
Video.title: Down-home Dog

Video.summary: A disastrous carjacking results in an arrest. Officers respond to a domestic abuse call involving two women. Officers find drug paraphernalia on a suspicious man parked in the middle of the street.
Video.title: Who's Girlfriend?

Video.summary: An assailant attacks a woman after bumping into her. A woman is arrested for spilling beer on a cameramanĺs equipment. Two intoxicated women are placed under arrest after a physical altercation.
Video.title: Running Amok

Video.summary: A man wearing womenĺs underwear exposes himself to a couple and the incident is caught on tape. Officers question a naked man in the backseat of a vehicle who claims to be camping.
Video.title: Naked Camping

Video.summary: A man jumps from a moving vehicle in an effort to escape the police. A car chase ends with a call to paramedics. An agitated man confuses threatening actions with heroism.
Video.title: Shaking Like a Paint Mixer

Video.summary: A lack of safety equipment calls attention to a lawbreaker. After a man waves a gun around, officers search homes in the surrounding area. Confusion surrounds suspects detained after a car crash.
Video.title: No Helmet, No Ride

Video.summary: A lawbreakerĺs polite and respectful demeanor surprises deputies. Suspicious activity at a gas station leads one officer to trust her gut. An argument over dinner results in a call to the cops.
Video.title: Too Many Cooks

Video.summary: Cops nab a suspect who tries to escape by hiding in plain sight. A man fires away when he believes his dog is in danger. Paramedics are called for a distraught woman and her catatonic partner.
Video.title: Sittinĺ in the Dark

Video.summary: An armed suspectĺs bloody state takes officers by surprise. The driver of a stolen car bails when he is pulled over. Officers apprehend several suspects after they spot a pair of carjacked vehicles.
Video.title: Carjacked Up

Video.summary: A man with many warrants puts up a fight when faced with jail. A desperate driver makes a last-minute attempt to hide his crime. A teenager must join the workforce after he makes a costly error.
Video.title: The Young and the Reckless

Video.summary: A young lawbreaker does everything she can to escape jail. Grandpa saves the day when Mom fails to do the right thing. A traffic stop leads one deputy to suspect an elderly duo of criminal activity.
Video.title: Clueless

Video.summary: Deputies respond to a brutal car wreck. The cops question a robbery suspect who claims to be the real victim. Officers find a man who says that he suffers from a disorder that causes him to run away.
Video.title: Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back

Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back

Video.summary: A lawbreaker tries to blame his actions on familial duty. A father is left with no choice but to call the cops on his son. Officers discover some interesting items when they search a family manĺs car.
Video.title: Out of Sight, Out of Mind

Image.alt: Out of Sight, Out of Mind
Out of Sight, Out of Mind
Out of Sight, Out of Mind
Out of Sight, Out of Mind

Out of Sight, Out of Mind
Out of Sight, Out of Mind
Out of Sight, Out of Mind

Video.summary: Family members are forced to take sides when a belligerent man lashes out. Deputies become suspicious when they spot people in the backseat of a parked car. A repeat offender is caught red-handed.
Video.title: Kicking and Screaming

Video.summary: A desperate suspect flees from the cops after shots are fired. A father and daughter are found in fear of a man wielding a screwdriver. The police catch a bunch of pretty women making poor choices.
Video.title: The Truth is Key

Video.summary: A young man receives a wakeup call when officers catch him breaking the law. A traffic stop turns up a trio with a lot to hide. Officers play peacemakers after a board game sparks a family feud.
Video.title: A Man Without a Plan
